## Summary

Describe the change and the problem it solves.

## Why

Explain the motivation, user impact, or technical need.

## Testing

- [ ] `bun run lint:web`
- [ ] `bun run typecheck:web`
- [ ] verified the changed flow locally
- [ ] not applicable

## Screenshots

Add screenshots or recordings for UI changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] the change is focused and does not mix unrelated work
- [ ] documentation was updated when behavior changed
- [ ] security-sensitive changes were reviewed carefully
- [ ] follow-up work is called out below if needed

## Follow-Up

List any known gaps, deferred work, or migration steps.
